title: Greven från gränden
writer: Paul Baudisch, Adolf Schütz, Nils Poppe
actors: Nils Poppe, Annalisa Ericson, Julia Cæsar
plot: The poor photographer Tibbe is the heir of the recently deceased count Silfverbaage. But there is a condition to get the money: he must stop seeing his old friends, including his fiancée Maja.
